description: Rules that determine when to escalate to a human support agent

immediate_escalation.description: Always escalate immediately — do not attempt to resolve
conditions: Customer reports money was taken but no KRW was dispensed
Machine error occurred mid-transaction with money already inserted
Passport was scanned but transaction failed and cash is missing
Customer received wrong amount of KRW
Machine dispensed less KRW than shown on confirmation screen
Customer suspects fraud or unauthorized transaction
Physical damage to the kiosk is observed
The kiosk is displaying an unexpected error code

escalate_after_guidance.description: Provide troubleshooting guidance first; escalate if issue persists
conditions: Banknote is rejected repeatedly despite following all guidelines
QR code does not work after basic troubleshooting steps
Kiosk screen is frozen or unresponsive
Customer cannot find the supported denomination or currency on screen

soft_escalation.description: Offer support link but do not require escalation
conditions: Customer asks about a past transaction
Customer asks about exchange rate discrepancy
Customer is dissatisfied with the answer provided

required_info_for_escalation: Photo or screenshot of error (if available)
non_escalation_topics: General questions about how the kiosk works
